keywordPatterns: [Calculator Name] - [Compounding Period / Feature Detail]  (e.g., 'Compound Interest Calculator - Daily, Monthly, Yearly Compounding')
[Calculator Name] With [Key Feature]  (e.g., 'Amortization Calculator With Extra Payments', 'Loan Calculator With Extra Payments')
[Calculator Name], [Synonym / Alt Name]  (e.g., 'Mortgage Repayment Calculator, Home Loan Calculator')
[Keyword] Calculator for [Use Cases]  (e.g., 'Interest Rate Calculator for Savings, Loans or Credit')
[Unit1] Converter: [Unit2] to [Unit3] & More  (e.g., 'Temperature Converter: Fahrenheit to Celsius & More')
[Unit1] and [Unit2] Converter - The Calculator Site  (e.g., 'Length Converter and Distance Converter - The Calculator Site')
[Adjective] [Category] Calculators from The Calculator Site  (e.g., 'Math Calculators from The Calculator Site')
[Calculator Name] (Expanded Acronym) and [Related Metric]  (e.g., 'BMR Calculator (Basal Metabolic Rate) and Daily Calories')
[Abbreviation] Calculator - Calculate Your [Metric]  (e.g., 'IRR Calculator - Calculate Your Rate of Return')
[Tool Name] - [Playful/Engaging Hook]  (e.g., 'Age Calculator 📅 (How Old Am I?)')
descriptionFormulas: Use this [tool name] to [action verb] [metric/value] [use-case context].  (e.g., 'Use this mortgage calculator tool to work out monthly and total costs of a capital repayment or interest only mortgage')
Use our [adjective] [tool name] to [action verb] [benefit].  (e.g., 'Use our free compound interest calculator to evaluate how your savings or investments might grow over time')
Use this [tool name] to convert instantly between [unit list].  (e.g., 'Use this liquid volume converter to convert instantly between barrels, cubic feet, gallons, liters, pints...')
[Action verb] your [metric] in [units] based upon [input].  (e.g., 'Calculate your age in years, months, weeks and days based upon your date of birth')
[Action verb] the [metric] you're receiving on your [financial product] using this [tool name].  (e.g., 'Find out what interest rate, APY or APR you're receiving on your savings or investment')
Learn about [topic] and how to use it to calculate [outcome].  (used on formula/article companion pages)
schemaTypes: FAQPage — used on calculator pages with Q&A sections (e.g., 'frequently asked questions about our daily compounding calculator')
WebApplication / SoftwareApplication — for interactive calculator tools (standard for this tool type)
Article / BlogPosting — on companion formula and educational articles (e.g., 'Compound Interest Formula With Examples')
BreadcrumbList — evidenced by structured category navigation (Finance > Calculators > Compound Interest)
HowTo — on formula/step-by-step guide pages explaining how to calculate manually
titlePatterns: [Calculator Name] - [Compounding Period / Feature Detail]  (e.g., 'Compound Interest Calculator - Daily, Monthly, Yearly Compounding')
[Calculator Name] With [Key Feature]  (e.g., 'Amortization Calculator With Extra Payments', 'Loan Calculator With Extra Payments')
[Calculator Name], [Synonym / Alt Name]  (e.g., 'Mortgage Repayment Calculator, Home Loan Calculator')
[Keyword] Calculator for [Use Cases]  (e.g., 'Interest Rate Calculator for Savings, Loans or Credit')
[Unit1] Converter: [Unit2] to [Unit3] & More  (e.g., 'Temperature Converter: Fahrenheit to Celsius & More')
[Unit1] and [Unit2] Converter - The Calculator Site  (e.g., 'Length Converter and Distance Converter - The Calculator Site')
[Adjective] [Category] Calculators from The Calculator Site  (e.g., 'Math Calculators from The Calculator Site')
[Calculator Name] (Expanded Acronym) and [Related Metric]  (e.g., 'BMR Calculator (Basal Metabolic Rate) and Daily Calories')
[Abbreviation] Calculator - Calculate Your [Metric]  (e.g., 'IRR Calculator - Calculate Your Rate of Return')
[Tool Name] - [Playful/Engaging Hook]  (e.g., 'Age Calculator 📅 (How Old Am I?)')
internalLinking: Persistent global nav sidebar groups all tools by category (Finance, Math, Conversions, Cooking, Health, Construction, Misc) — present on every single page
Each calculator page features a 'Related Calculators' section linking to same-category tools (e.g., compound interest links to savings, CAGR, simple interest)
Category hub pages (/finance/, /math/, /conversions/) act as topical silos aggregating all calculators per vertical
Formula/article companion pages (e.g., /compound-interest-formula) link back to the primary calculator, creating hub-and-spoke content clusters
Cross-category contextual links within body copy (e.g., weight converter body text links to water weight calculator and cooking converter)
Homepage spotlights top-traffic flagship tools (compound interest, loan, percentage) with direct CTAs, concentrating link equity
Breadcrumb navigation reinforces category hierarchy (Home > Finance > Calculators > [Tool Name]) for crawlability and UX
